name: grandma_multimedia
description: Allows the assistant to play music/radio and show photo slideshows.

actions.name: player_control
actions.description: Controls the music/radio player. Payload: 'play|station' or 'stop' or 'volume|level'.

actions.name: gallery_show
actions.description: Shows a slideshow of photos. Payload: 'folder name' (e.g., 'grandkids').
